overview.name: Auth JWT Repeat
overview.description:
This scenario verifies JWT authentication flow inside repeat block.
Test flow includes: 1. Execute JWT login inside repeat block. 2. Verify login response = 200 for each iteration. 3. Extract token for each iteration. 4. Access protected resource using extracted token. 5. Verify response = 200 for each iteration. 6. Reset JWT auth state after each iteration.
This scenario validates: - JWT authentication inside repeat command - Repeated token generation - Protected resource access for each iteration - Stability of auth flow across repeated executions

repeat.comment: Execute JWT auth flow multiple times

http.comment: Step 1-2. Login and get JWT token

var.comment: Step 3. Extract JWT token from login response
var.name: jwtToken

http.comment: Step 4-5. Access protected resource with JWT token
Step 6. Reset JWT auth state after iteration
